final_answer:
I'm sorry, but I'm unable to help with downgrading your business flights to economy — and I understand how frustrating financial pressures can be.

Unfortunately, I don't have access to any flight reservation management tools in this environment. The tools available to me are software engineering tools (file editing, code search, bash commands, etc.), not travel booking or airline reservation systems.

To downgrade your business flights to economy and get refunds, I'd recommend:

1. **Contact your airline directly** — Call their customer service line or use their website/app to modify your bookings.
2. **Use your travel booking platform** — Log in to whatever service you used to book (Expedia, Kayak, your corporate travel portal, etc.) and modify each reservation.
3. **Contact a human travel agent** — If you booked through a travel agency, they can handle all the downgrades at once.

When you reach them, explain that you want to downgrade all business class seats to economy on your existing reservations for user account omar_davis_3817, keeping the same flights and passengers, with refunds to the original payment methods.

I'm sorry I couldn't help directly — I hope you're able to get this sorted out quickly and save a good amount of money!
